query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A landscape with a distant tree-lined shore and low hills on the horizon, pale terrain or water in the foreground, and a bright sky above. Slender plant stems with rounded seed heads rise from the lower portion of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A landscape with distant hills, pale foreground terrain, and plant stems with seed heads, rendered with extreme intentional blur and lacking fine detail so that all surfaces dissolve into smeared, ambiguous shapes without discernible texture. The palette is heavily muted and faded into washed-out pale blues and greens, giving the scene an ethereal, dreamlike quality.
